title: Settings
languageHint: Choose the language used by AlterSend.

crashReports.label: Crash reports
crashReports.description: Share anonymous crash data to help improve AlterSend

relay.label: Use relay when direct connection fails
relay.description: When two devices can't connect directly (for example both on a VPN), the transfer is routed through AlterSend's relay. Files stay end-to-end encrypted.
relay.contact: Need a dedicated relay or higher limits?
relay.fairUse: The relay has limits on transfer size and how many transfers can run at once.

rows.feedbackHint: Report a problem or suggest a feature

pairing.noPairedDevicesHint: Pair a device to send without a code.
pairing.enterCodeHint: Type or paste an invite code shared from another device
pairing.codeError: Invalid code — check and try again.
pairing.couldNotJoinHint: Make sure the invite code is still active.
pairing.couldNotJoinQrHint: Make sure the QR code is still open on the other device.
pairing.noQrFoundHint: Choose an image with an AlterSend pairing code.
pairing.cameraAccessText: Allow camera access to scan a pairing QR code.

pairPrompt.title: Set up your devices
pairPrompt.heading: Skip the code next time
pairPrompt.body: Pair a device you use often and send to it instantly — no code to scan or type each time.
